summary: P0 Fix Verified: Growth Dashboard funnel data quality fix for datetime/string type mismatch in MongoDB queries. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified showing correct Story Created count (60) with 30d period. Landing page A/B variant B default working. Responsive support widgets regression check passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Dashboard P0 fix verified. The datetime/string type mismatch in MongoDB queries for pipeline_jobs.created_at has been fixed. Key findings: (1) API /api/admin/metrics/growth?hours=720 returns share_funnel.created=60 (was 0 before fix), (2) API /api/admin/metrics/funnel-debug?days=90 returns funnel_trace.4_stories_created.count=60, (3) API /api/admin/metrics/summary?days=90 returns total_generations=290, completed=60, (4) API /api/admin/metrics/story-performance returns deduplicated stories, (5) Landing page sets heroVariant to 'B' by default for new users, (6) Desktop floating widgets visible, mobile support dock visible. Note: With shorter time periods (24h, 72h, 168h), Story Created shows 0 because the pipeline_jobs data is older than 7 days - this is expected behavior.

verified_features.feature: Growth Dashboard shows non-zero 'Story Created' count
verified_features.details: With 30d period (hours=720), Story Created = 60. With shorter periods, shows 0 because data is older than 7 days.

verified_features.feature: Growth Dashboard 'Share Funnel Drop-off' table shows correct counts
verified_features.details: All stages showing correct counts: Landing Visit=183, CTA Click=1, Story Created=60, Story Shared=41, Share Opened=75, Continued=15, Re-shared=0

verified_features.feature: Landing page sets heroVariant to 'B' by default
Landing page hero shows Variant B content
verified_features.details: Hero heading: 'Turn any idea into a viral AI video', Badge: 'No editing. No experience needed.'

verified_features.feature: Desktop floating chatbot and support widgets visible
verified_features.details: Chatbot toggle and feedback toggle visible on desktop (1920px)

verified_features.feature: Mobile support dock visible, no floating widgets
verified_features.details: Support dock visible at bottom, floating widgets hidden on mobile (375px)
Admin login returns valid token and correct credits

rca_of_the_issue: Root cause was a datetime/string type mismatch in MongoDB queries. pipeline_jobs.created_at is stored as a datetime object in MongoDB, but queries were comparing it with since_str (an ISO string). MongoDB cannot compare datetime to string, so it returned 0 results for all pipeline_jobs time-filtered queries. The fix changes all pipeline_jobs queries to use the datetime object directly (since) instead of the ISO string (since_str).
